name: Vegetable Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons melted butter, or other fat
1 cup cooked or canned peas, or string beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the melted butter with 3/4 of the bread crumbs. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine all remaining ingredients.
3. Form the mixture into a loaf on a sheet of greased paper.
4. Cover the surface of the loaf with bread crumbs.
5. Place the loaf on a rack in an uncovered pan.
6. Bake in a moderate oven for 30 minutes.
7. The loaf should be hot through and have golden-brown crumbs when done.
8. Serve with tomato sauce.
